title: Spicy Stuff Mod
description: Adding spicy peppers to Minecraft was a brilliant idea with zero consequences (except when you breathe fire on mobs and completely vaporize them). - MOD WILL SOON BE MERGED
body: This mod adds a few unique items to the game.  There are four spicy peppers, each of which gives you a different level of the new "Spiciness" effect.  The effect can let you breathe fire (shoot blaze fireballs out of your mouth) or explode, but the effect damages you. To balance this, there is a new item which heals you so that you can use the "Spiciness" effect without dying.  You can craft spicy peppers by combing an apple with blaze powder in a crafting grid.  One Blaze Powder makes a Ghost Pepper, two Blaze Powder makes a Red Savina Habanero, three makes a Carolina Reaper, and four makes a Pepper X.
